title: Bavakar cardio package

The '''Bavakar cardio package''' was a [[Cybernetics/Legends|cybernetic]] [[Brain/Legends|brain]] implant used during the [[Jedi Civil War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Darth Revan's Sith Empire|Sith Empire]]. The implant was manufactured by [[Bavakar Medical Research Labs]], considered the leading cybernetics [[Laboratory/Legends|laboratory]] at the [[Time/Legends|time]]. The device, which cost two thousand [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]], was a powerful type of [[cardio package]] that improved the cardiovascular fitness of an [[Species/Legends|organic]] user far beyond what could be achieved through normal means<ref name="KOTOR" /> by encouraging the brain to send certain stimulating chemicals to several organs, including the [[Heart/Legends|heart]]. The complexity of implants meant that users needed special training and could only use one at a time.<ref name="Campaign">''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]''</ref>

A Bavakar cardio package was used by [[Shasa]], a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Selkath/Legends|Selkath]] who lived on the<ref name="KOTOR" /> [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Manaan/Legends|Manaan]]<ref name="Campaign" /> in [[3956 BBY]].<ref name="Date">''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' places the events of ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' in [[3956 BBY]].</ref> She was brainwashed and [[Sith training|trained]] in the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side]] at the [[Waterworld/Legends|waterworld's]] [[Sith Embassy]]. Former [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]], [[Jedi training/Legends|retrained]] as a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Padawan/Legends|Padawan]], [[Raid on the Sith Embassy|raided]] the embassy<ref name="KOTOR" /> and freed Shasa from [[Sith/Legends|Sith]] influence.<ref name="Shasa">{{Wizards|url=default.asp?x=starwars/article/KOTORweben7|text=KOTOR Campaign Guide Web Enhancement 7: Shasa}}</ref>

==Behind the scenes==
The Bavakar cardio package first appears as an equipment item in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'', developed by [[BioWare]]. The player can only obtain the implant by [[Death/Legends|killing]] Shasa during the "Missing Selkath" quest.<ref name="KOTOR" /> However, the seventh web enhancement for the ''[[Knights of the Old Republic Campaign Guide]]'' establishes that Shasa was rescued by Revan and survived,<ref name="Shasa" /> establishing that Revan took the [[Light side of the Force/Legends|light side]] option during the quest.<ref name="KOTOR" />
